---
title: "Multidimensional IRT Analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
source("source.R")
```

## Load Data

```{r}
bundle       <- readRDS("data/bundle.rds")
data_all     <- bundle$data_all
accept_vars  <- bundle$acceptability_vars
service_vars <- bundle$accept_service_vars
info_vars    <- bundle$accept_info_vars
data_vars    <- bundle$accept_data_vars

fit_grm <- readRDS("results/fit_grm.rds")

data_irt <- data_all %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(accept_vars), ~ as.numeric(.x))) %>%
  rename(id = uuid) %>%
  select(id, country_code, age, gender, education, all_of(accept_vars))

data_complete <- data_irt %>%
  filter(complete.cases(across(all_of(accept_vars))))

items         <- data_complete %>% select(all_of(accept_vars)) %>% as.data.frame()
group_country <- factor(data_complete$country_code)

n_service <- length(service_vars)
n_info    <- length(info_vars)
n_data    <- length(data_vars)

cat("Respondents:", nrow(data_complete), "| Items:", ncol(items), "\n")
stopifnot(n_service + n_info + n_data == length(accept_vars))
```

## Model Specifications

```{r}
# 2D: Service vs combined Information + Data (intermediate model)
model_2d <- mirt.model(paste0(
  "Service  = 1-", n_service, "\n",
  "InfoData = ", n_service + 1, "-", n_service + n_info + n_data, "\n",
  "COV = Service*InfoData"
))

# 3D: simple structure — each item loads on exactly one dimension
model_3d <- mirt.model(paste0(
  "Service     = 1-", n_service, "\n",
  "Information = ", n_service + 1, "-", n_service + n_info, "\n",
  "Data        = ", n_service + n_info + 1, "-", n_service + n_info + n_data, "\n",
  "COV = Service*Information*Data"
))
```

## Fit Models

```{r}
fit_2d <- mirt(
  data     = items,
  model    = model_2d,
  itemtype = "graded",
  SE       = FALSE,
  verbose  = FALSE
)

fit_3d <- mirt(
  data     = items,
  model    = model_3d,
  itemtype = "graded",
  SE       = TRUE,
  verbose  = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
# 2D fit statistics
fit_2d_stats <- M2(fit_2d)
cat("2D FIT: RMSEA =", round(fit_2d_stats$RMSEA, 4),
    " CFI =", round(fit_2d_stats$CFI, 4),
    " TLI =", round(fit_2d_stats$TLI, 4), "\n")
```

## 1D vs 2D vs 3D Comparison

```{r}
fit_1d_stats <- M2(fit_grm)
fit_3d_stats <- M2(fit_3d)

cat("1D FIT: RMSEA =", round(fit_1d_stats$RMSEA, 4),
    " CFI =", round(fit_1d_stats$CFI, 4),
    " TLI =", round(fit_1d_stats$TLI, 4), "\n")

cat("3D FIT: RMSEA =", round(fit_3d_stats$RMSEA, 4),
    " CFI =", round(fit_3d_stats$CFI, 4),
    " TLI =", round(fit_3d_stats$TLI, 4), "\n")
```

```{r}
# AIC/BIC/logLik comparison
dim_comparison <- data.frame(
  Model  = c("1D GRM", "2D GRM", "3D GRM"),
  AIC    = round(c(fit_grm@Fit$AIC, fit_2d@Fit$AIC, fit_3d@Fit$AIC), 1),
  BIC    = round(c(fit_grm@Fit$BIC, fit_2d@Fit$BIC, fit_3d@Fit$BIC), 1),
  logLik = round(c(fit_grm@Fit$logLik, fit_2d@Fit$logLik, fit_3d@Fit$logLik), 1)
)

print(dim_comparison)
write.csv(dim_comparison, "results/comparison_1d_2d_3d.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Likelihood ratio tests
anova(fit_grm, fit_2d)  # 1D vs 2D
anova(fit_2d,  fit_3d)  # 2D vs 3D
```

## 3D Model: Factor Structure

```{r}
summary(fit_3d)

# Inter-dimension correlations
cov_mat <- coef(fit_3d, simplify = TRUE)$cov
sd_vec  <- sqrt(diag(cov_mat))
cor_mat <- cov_mat / outer(sd_vec, sd_vec)
rownames(cor_mat) <- colnames(cor_mat) <- c("Service", "Information", "Data")
round(cor_mat, 3)
write.csv(as.data.frame(cor_mat), "results/dimension_correlations.csv")
```

```{r}
# Item discriminations per dimension
params_3d    <- coef(fit_3d, simplify = TRUE)$items
params_3d_df <- as.data.frame(params_3d) %>%
  mutate(
    item      = rownames(params_3d),
    dimension = case_when(
      item %in% service_vars ~ "Service",
      item %in% info_vars    ~ "Information",
      item %in% data_vars    ~ "Data"
    ),
    discrimination = case_when(
      dimension == "Service"     ~ a1,
      dimension == "Information" ~ a2,
      dimension == "Data"        ~ a3
    )
  )
```

```{r}
p_loadings <- ggplot(params_3d_df,
                     aes(x = discrimination,
                         y = reorder(item, discrimination),
                         fill = dimension)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_dimension() +
  facet_wrap(~ dimension, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Item Discriminations by Dimension (3D GRM)",
       x = "Discrimination Parameter (a)", y = NULL) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_loadings)
ggsave("results/plot11_3d_loadings.pdf", p_loadings, width = 14, height = 8)
```

## Theta Scores

```{r}
theta_3d <- fscores(fit_3d, method = "EAP", full.scores = TRUE)

data_complete$theta_service     <- theta_3d[, 1]
data_complete$theta_information <- theta_3d[, 2]
data_complete$theta_data        <- theta_3d[, 3]

theta_3d_country <- data_complete %>%
  group_by(country_code) %>%
  summarise(
    n           = n(),
    service     = round(mean(theta_service), 3),
    information = round(mean(theta_information), 3),
    data        = round(mean(theta_data), 3)
  )

print(theta_3d_country)
write.csv(theta_3d_country, "results/theta_3d_by_country.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Boxplot by dimension and country
theta_long <- data_complete %>%
  select(country_code, theta_service, theta_information, theta_data) %>%
  pivot_longer(starts_with("theta_"), names_to = "dimension", values_to = "theta") %>%
  mutate(dimension = recode(dimension,
    "theta_service"     = "Service",
    "theta_information" = "Information",
    "theta_data"        = "Data"
  ))

p_3d <- ggplot(theta_long, aes(x = country_code, y = theta, fill = country_code)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  facet_wrap(~ dimension) +
  scale_fill_country() +
  labs(title = "Latent Acceptance by Dimension and Country",
       x = "Country", y = "\u03b8") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(p_3d)
ggsave("results/plot10_3d_by_country.pdf", p_3d, width = 12, height = 5)
```

## Item Characteristic Curves

```{r}
# Varies only the item's own dimension, holds others at 0
theta_seq <- seq(-3, 3, by = 0.1)

get_2d_icc <- function(item_num, dim_num) {
  Theta            <- matrix(0, nrow = length(theta_seq), ncol = 3)
  Theta[, dim_num] <- theta_seq
  probs            <- probtrace(extract.item(fit_3d, item_num), Theta)
  data.frame(theta = theta_seq,
             cat1 = probs[,1], cat2 = probs[,2],
             cat3 = probs[,3], cat4 = probs[,4],
             item = accept_vars[item_num])
}
```

```{r}
plot_icc <- function(icc_data, title) {
  icc_data %>%
    pivot_longer(c(cat1, cat2, cat3, cat4),
                 names_to = "category", values_to = "probability") %>%
    mutate(category = recode(category,
      "cat1" = "Not acceptable at all", "cat2" = "Not very acceptable",
      "cat3" = "Somewhat acceptable",   "cat4" = "Very acceptable"
    )) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = theta, y = probability, color = category)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    facet_wrap(~ item, ncol = 3) +
    scale_colour_response() +
    labs(title = title, x = "\u03b8", y = "Probability", color = NULL) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

```{r}
service_icc <- bind_rows(lapply(which(accept_vars %in% service_vars), get_2d_icc, dim_num = 1))
info_icc    <- bind_rows(lapply(which(accept_vars %in% info_vars),    get_2d_icc, dim_num = 2))
data_icc    <- bind_rows(lapply(which(accept_vars %in% data_vars),    get_2d_icc, dim_num = 3))

print(plot_icc(service_icc, "ICC \u2014 Service Dimension"))
print(plot_icc(info_icc,    "ICC \u2014 Information Dimension"))
print(plot_icc(data_icc,    "ICC \u2014 Data Dimension"))
```

## Item Difficulty

```{r}
params_3d_irt    <- coef(fit_3d, IRTpars = TRUE, simplify = TRUE)$items
params_3d_irt_df <- as.data.frame(params_3d_irt) %>%
  mutate(
    item      = rownames(params_3d_irt),
    dimension = case_when(
      item %in% service_vars ~ "Service",
      item %in% info_vars    ~ "Information",
      item %in% data_vars    ~ "Data"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# First threshold (b1), point size = discrimination
p_difficulty <- ggplot(params_3d_irt_df, aes(x = b1, y = reorder(item, b1))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = a1 + a2 + a3),
             color = unname(palette_thesis["slate"]), alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = unname(palette_thesis["rose"])) +
  facet_wrap(~ dimension, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title    = "Item Difficulty by Dimension (3D GRM)",
       subtitle = "Point size = discrimination; b1 = first threshold",
       x = "Difficulty (b1)", y = NULL, size = "Discrimination") +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text  = element_text(size = 12)
  ) + 
  theme(
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 16),   # item names
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12),   # x axis numbers
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),   # "Difficulty (b1)"
    strip.text   = element_text(size = 16),   # "Data", "Information", "Service"
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 20),   # main title
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 15),  # subtitle
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 16),   # legend numbers
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18)    # "Discrimination"
  )
  

print(p_difficulty)
ggsave("results/plot17_3d_difficulty.pdf", p_difficulty, width = 40, height = 10)
```

```{r}
# All three thresholds per item
params_3d_irt_df %>%
  select(item, dimension, b1, b2, b3) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(b1, b2, b3), names_to = "threshold", values_to = "difficulty") %>%
  mutate(threshold = recode(threshold,
    "b1" = "b1 (1\u21922)",
    "b2" = "b2 (2\u21923)",
    "b3" = "b3 (3\u21924)"
  )) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = difficulty, y = reorder(item, difficulty),
             color = threshold, shape = threshold)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_colour_threshold() +
  facet_wrap(~ dimension, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title    = "Item Threshold Hierarchy by Dimension (3D GRM)",
       subtitle = "b1 = 1\u21922, b2 = 2\u21923, b3 = 3\u21924",
       x = "Difficulty (threshold)", y = NULL,
       color = "Threshold", shape = "Threshold") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Item Fit

```{r}
itemfit_3d <- itemfit(fit_3d)

cat("Items with poor fit (p < .05):",
    sum(itemfit_3d$p.S_X2 < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    "out of", length(accept_vars), "\n")
cat("Max RMSEA.S_X2:", round(max(itemfit_3d$RMSEA.S_X2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")

print(itemfit_3d[, c("item", "S_X2", "p.S_X2", "RMSEA.S_X2")])

# Compare 1D vs 3D item fit
if (exists("itemfit_stats")) {
  fit_comparison <- data.frame(
    item      = itemfit_3d$item,
    RMSEA_1D  = round(itemfit_stats$RMSEA.S_X2, 4),
    RMSEA_3D  = round(itemfit_3d$RMSEA.S_X2, 4),
    dimension = case_when(
      itemfit_3d$item %in% service_vars ~ "Service",
      itemfit_3d$item %in% info_vars    ~ "Information",
      itemfit_3d$item %in% data_vars    ~ "Data"
    )
  ) %>% mutate(improved = RMSEA_3D < RMSEA_1D)

  cat("Items with improved fit in 3D vs 1D:",
      sum(fit_comparison$improved, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  write.csv(fit_comparison, "results/itemfit_1d_vs_3d.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}
```

## Measurement Invariance

```{r}
# One anchor item per dimension (middle item)
anchor_items <- c(
  service_vars[ceiling(length(service_vars) / 2)],
  info_vars[ceiling(length(info_vars) / 2)],
  data_vars[ceiling(length(data_vars) / 2)]
)
cat("Anchor items:", paste(anchor_items, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r}
mg_configural <- multipleGroup(
  data       = items,
  model      = model_3d,
  group      = group_country,
  itemtype   = "graded",
  invariance = c("free_means", "free_var", anchor_items),
  SE         = TRUE,
  verbose    = FALSE
)

mg_metric <- multipleGroup(
  data       = items,
  model      = model_3d,
  group      = group_country,
  itemtype   = "graded",
  invariance = c("free_means", "free_var", anchor_items, "slopes"),
  SE         = FALSE,
  verbose    = FALSE
)

mg_scalar <- multipleGroup(
  data       = items,
  model      = model_3d,
  group      = group_country,
  itemtype   = "graded",
  invariance = c("free_means", "free_var", anchor_items, "slopes", "intercepts"),
  SE         = FALSE,
  verbose    = FALSE
)

inv_tests <- anova(mg_configural, mg_metric, mg_scalar)
print(inv_tests)
write.csv(as.data.frame(inv_tests), "results/mg_invariance_tests.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Fit table and ΔAIC
inv_fit_table <- data.frame(
  Model  = c("Configural", "Metric", "Scalar"),
  AIC    = round(inv_tests$AIC, 1),
  BIC    = round(inv_tests$BIC, 1),
  logLik = round(inv_tests$logLik, 1)
)
print(inv_fit_table)
write.csv(inv_fit_table, "results/invariance_fit_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

aic_config_metric <- inv_fit_table$AIC[1] - inv_fit_table$AIC[2]
aic_metric_scalar <- inv_fit_table$AIC[2] - inv_fit_table$AIC[3]

cat("Config \u2192 Metric \u0394AIC:", round(aic_config_metric, 1), "\n")
cat("Metric \u2192 Scalar \u0394AIC:", round(aic_metric_scalar, 1), "\n")

if (abs(aic_config_metric) < 10) {
  cat("\u2192 Metric invariance practically supported\n")
} else {
  cat("\u2192 Some discrimination differences across countries\n")
}

if (abs(aic_metric_scalar) < 10) {
  cat("\u2192 Scalar invariance practically supported\n")
} else if (abs(aic_metric_scalar) < 100) {
  cat("\u2192 Partial non-invariance — comparisons meaningful but note limitations\n")
} else {
  cat("\u2192 Substantial non-invariance — interpret country comparisons cautiously\n")
}
```

```{r}
# Configural model global fit
mg_fit <- M2(mg_configural)
print(mg_fit)
```

## Differential Item Functioning (DIF)

```{r}
# Save multigroup models
saveRDS(mg_configural, "results/mg_configural.rds")
saveRDS(mg_metric,     "results/mg_metric.rds")
saveRDS(mg_scalar,     "results/mg_scalar.rds")

# Item-dimension lookup (reused across DIF sections)
item_dim_lookup <- data.frame(
  item      = c(service_vars, info_vars, data_vars),
  dimension = c(rep("Service",     length(service_vars)),
                rep("Information", length(info_vars)),
                rep("Data",        length(data_vars)))
)
```

### DIF from Configural Model

```{r}
cf        <- coef(mg_configural, simplify = TRUE)
par_names <- colnames(cf[[1]]$items)
which_par <- intersect(c("a1", "a2", "a3", "d1", "d2", "d3"), par_names)
cat("Testing parameters:", paste(which_par, collapse = ", "), "\n")

dif_results     <- DIF(mg_configural, which.par = which_par, scheme = "drop")
dif_3d_tbl      <- as.data.frame(dif_results)
dif_3d_tbl$item <- rownames(dif_3d_tbl)

saveRDS(dif_3d_tbl, "results/dif_3d_tbl.rds")
write.csv(dif_3d_tbl, "results/dif_3d_drop.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
dif_with_dim <- dif_3d_tbl %>% left_join(item_dim_lookup, by = "item")

if ("p" %in% names(dif_3d_tbl)) {
  dif_3d_tbl$p_adj_fdr <- p.adjust(dif_3d_tbl$p, method = "fdr")
}

dif_tested <- dif_with_dim %>% filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0)

cat("Items testable:", nrow(dif_tested), "\n")
cat("Items with significant DIF (p < .05):", sum(dif_tested$p < 0.05), "\n")
print(dif_tested[, c("item", "dimension", "X2", "df", "p")])
```

```{r}
# DIF table for thesis
dif_thesis_table <- dif_tested %>%
  select(item, dimension, X2, df, p) %>%
  mutate(X2 = round(X2, 2),
         p  = formatC(p, format = "e", digits = 2))

print(dif_thesis_table)
write.csv(dif_with_dim,     "results/dif_3d_full.csv",      row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(dif_thesis_table, "results/dif_thesis_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Plot configural DIF
dif_configural_plot <- dif_with_dim %>%
  filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = p < .05,
    item_label  = gsub("_", " ", item),
    item_label  = factor(item_label, levels = rev(item_label))
  )

p_dif_configural <- ggplot(dif_configural_plot,
                aes(x = X2, y = item_label, fill = dimension, alpha = significant)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = qchisq(0.95, df = 8),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_dimension() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "Significant", "FALSE" = "n.s."),
                     name = "") +
  labs(title    = "DIF from Configural Model",
       subtitle = "Only anchor items testable due to parameter constraints",
       x = "\u03c7\u00b2 Statistic", y = NULL, fill = "Dimension") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_dif_configural)
ggsave("results/plot_dif_configural.pdf", p_dif_configural, width = 8, height = 4)
```

### DIF from Scalar Model

```{r}
cf_scalar <- coef(mg_scalar, simplify = TRUE)
which_par <- intersect(c("a1", "a2", "a3", "d1", "d2", "d3"),
                       colnames(cf_scalar[[1]]$items))

dif_scalar     <- DIF(mg_scalar, which.par = which_par, scheme = "drop")
dif_scalar_tbl <- as.data.frame(dif_scalar)
dif_scalar_tbl$item <- rownames(dif_scalar_tbl)

dif_scalar_tbl <- dif_scalar_tbl %>%
  mutate(p_adj_fdr = p.adjust(p, method = "fdr")) %>%
  left_join(item_dim_lookup, by = "item")

dif_scalar_tested <- dif_scalar_tbl %>% filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0)

cat("Items testable:", nrow(dif_scalar_tested), "\n")
cat("Significant raw p < .05:", sum(dif_scalar_tested$p < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Significant FDR p < .05:", sum(dif_scalar_tested$p_adj_fdr < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

print(dif_scalar_tested %>% select(item, dimension, X2, df, p, p_adj_fdr))

write.csv(dif_scalar_tbl,    "results/dif_from_scalar_full.csv",   row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(dif_scalar_tested, "results/dif_from_scalar_tested.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Plot scalar DIF
dif_plot_data <- dif_scalar_tbl %>%
  filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = p < .05,
    item_label  = gsub("_", " ", item),
    item_label  = factor(item_label, levels = rev(item_label))
  )

p_dif <- ggplot(dif_plot_data,
                aes(x = X2, y = item_label, fill = dimension, alpha = significant)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = qchisq(0.95, df = 8),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_dimension() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "Significant", "FALSE" = "n.s."),
                     name = "") +
  labs(title    = "Differential Item Functioning by Item",
       subtitle = "Red dashed line = \u03c7\u00b2 critical value (df = 8, p = .05)",
       x = "\u03c7\u00b2 Statistic", y = NULL, fill = "Dimension") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_dif)
ggsave("results/plot_dif_scalar.pdf", p_dif, width = 10, height = 10)
```

```{r}
# Country deviations heatmap
cf_scalar_coefs <- coef(mg_scalar, simplify = TRUE)

country_params <- lapply(names(cf_scalar_coefs)[1:3], function(grp) {
  df <- as.data.frame(cf_scalar_coefs[[grp]]$items)
  df$item    <- rownames(df)
  df$country <- grp
  df
}) %>% bind_rows() %>%
  left_join(item_dim_lookup %>% select(item, dimension), by = "item") %>%
  mutate(discrimination = case_when(
    dimension == "Service"     ~ a1,
    dimension == "Information" ~ a2,
    dimension == "Data"        ~ a3
  ))

country_params_heat <- country_params %>%
  group_by(item, dimension) %>%
  mutate(deviation = discrimination - mean(discrimination))

p_dif_heat <- ggplot(country_params_heat,
                     aes(x = country, y = reorder(item, discrimination),
                         fill = deviation)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low  = unname(palette_thesis["rose"]),
                       mid  = "white",
                       high = unname(palette_thesis["teal"]),
                       midpoint = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~ dimension, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title    = "Country Deviations in Item Discrimination",
       subtitle = "Blue = higher than average, Red = lower than average",
       x = "Country", y = NULL, fill = "Deviation") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_dif_heat)
ggsave("results/plot_dif_country_heatmap.pdf", p_dif_heat, width = 12, height = 10)
```

### Slope vs Threshold DIF

```{r}
# Slope DIF: tests whether discrimination differs across countries
dif_slope     <- DIF(mg_scalar, which.par = c("a1", "a2", "a3"), scheme = "drop")
dif_slope_tbl <- as.data.frame(dif_slope)
dif_slope_tbl$item <- rownames(dif_slope_tbl)

dif_slope_tbl <- dif_slope_tbl %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p, method = "fdr")) %>%
  left_join(item_dim_lookup, by = "item")

cat("Slope DIF testable:", sum(!is.na(dif_slope_tbl$p) & dif_slope_tbl$df > 0), "\n")
cat("Significant raw p < .05:", sum(dif_slope_tbl$p < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Significant FDR p < .05:", sum(dif_slope_tbl$p_fdr < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

print(dif_slope_tbl %>%
        filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0) %>%
        select(item, dimension, X2, df, p, p_fdr) %>%
        arrange(p_fdr))

write.csv(dif_slope_tbl, "results/dif_slope.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Threshold DIF: tests whether thresholds differ across countries
dif_threshold <- DIF(
  mg_scalar,
  which.par = c("d1", "d2", "d3"),
  scheme    = "drop",
  technical = list(NCYCLES = 200),
  parallel  = TRUE
)

dif_thresh_tbl <- as.data.frame(dif_threshold)
dif_thresh_tbl$item <- rownames(dif_thresh_tbl)

dif_thresh_tbl <- dif_thresh_tbl %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p, method = "fdr")) %>%
  left_join(item_dim_lookup, by = "item")

cat("Threshold DIF testable:", sum(!is.na(dif_thresh_tbl$p) & dif_thresh_tbl$df > 0), "\n")
cat("Significant raw p < .05:", sum(dif_thresh_tbl$p < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Significant FDR p < .05:", sum(dif_thresh_tbl$p_fdr < .05, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

print(dif_thresh_tbl %>%
        filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0) %>%
        select(item, dimension, X2, df, p, p_fdr) %>%
        arrange(p_fdr))

write.csv(dif_thresh_tbl, "results/dif_threshold.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Combined DIF summary table
dif_summary <- dif_slope_tbl %>%
  select(item, dimension, X2_slope = X2, df_slope = df,
         p_slope = p, p_slope_fdr = p_fdr) %>%
  left_join(
    dif_thresh_tbl %>%
      select(item, X2_thresh = X2, df_thresh = df,
             p_thresh = p, p_thresh_fdr = p_fdr),
    by = "item"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    slope_sig  = ifelse(!is.na(p_slope_fdr)  & df_slope  > 0 & p_slope_fdr  < .05, "Yes", "No"),
    thresh_sig = ifelse(!is.na(p_thresh_fdr) & df_thresh > 0 & p_thresh_fdr < .05, "Yes", "No")
  )

cat("Slope DIF significant (FDR):",    sum(dif_summary$slope_sig  == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Threshold DIF significant (FDR):", sum(dif_summary$thresh_sig == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

print(dif_summary %>% select(item, dimension, slope_sig, thresh_sig))
write.csv(dif_summary, "results/dif_summary_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Plot slope DIF (most critical form)
dif_slope_plot <- dif_slope_tbl %>%
  filter(!is.na(p) & df > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = p_fdr < .05,
    item_label  = gsub("_", " ", item),
    item_label  = factor(item_label, levels = rev(item_label))
  )

p_dif_slope <- ggplot(dif_slope_plot,
                      aes(x = X2, y = item_label, fill = dimension, alpha = significant)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = qchisq(0.95, df = 3),
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_dimension() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.35),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "Significant", "FALSE" = "n.s."),
                     name = "") +
  labs(title    = "Slope DIF by Item (Discrimination Parameters)",
       subtitle = "Red dashed line = \u03c7\u00b2 critical value (df = 3, p = .05)\nFaded = non-significant after FDR correction",
       x = "\u03c7\u00b2 Statistic", y = NULL, fill = "Dimension") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_dif_slope)
ggsave("results/plot_dif_slope.pdf", p_dif_slope, width = 10, height = 10)
```

## Save Final Dataset

```{r}
theta_1d <- read.csv("results/data_with_theta.csv") %>% select(uuid, theta_grm)

final_data <- data_all %>%
  left_join(
    data_complete %>%
      select(id, theta_service, theta_information, theta_data) %>%
      rename(uuid = id),
    by = "uuid"
  ) %>%
  left_join(theta_1d, by = "uuid")

saveRDS(final_data, "results/data_final_all_thetas.rds")
write.csv(final_data, "results/data_final_all_thetas.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(fit_2d, "results/fit_2d.rds")
saveRDS(fit_3d, "results/fit_3d.rds")

cat("Theta columns:", paste(grep("theta", names(final_data), value = TRUE), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Rows:", nrow(final_data), "\n")
```

## Summary

```{r}
cat("MODEL FIT:\n")
cat("  1D RMSEA =", round(fit_1d_stats$RMSEA, 3),
    " CFI =", round(fit_1d_stats$CFI, 3), "\n")
cat("  3D RMSEA =", round(fit_3d_stats$RMSEA, 3),
    " CFI =", round(fit_3d_stats$CFI, 3), "\n\n")

cat("DIMENSION CORRELATIONS:\n")
print(round(cor_mat, 3))

cat("\nCOUNTRY THETA MEANS (3D):\n")
print(theta_3d_country)

cat("\nMEASUREMENT INVARIANCE:\n")
cat("  Config \u2192 Metric \u0394AIC:", round(aic_config_metric, 1), "\n")
cat("  Metric \u2192 Scalar \u0394AIC:", round(aic_metric_scalar, 1), "\n\n")

cat("DIF:\n")
cat("  Slope significant (FDR):",    sum(dif_summary$slope_sig  == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Threshold significant (FDR):", sum(dif_summary$thresh_sig == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE), "\n\n")

cat("ITEM FIT:\n")
cat("  Max RMSEA.S_X2:",
    round(max(itemfit_3d$RMSEA.S_X2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Package versions for reproducibility
R.version.string
packageVersion("mirt")
packageVersion("psych")
packageVersion("dplyr")
packageVersion("ggplot2")
```
